cadence: recomputed each run from the published lane data
caveats: Search covers organizations paid through the state checkbook (Open FI$Cal vendor payments). Organizations that appear only in federal or nonprofit data are reached through those sections, not this box.
Selecting a result opens the drill at the vendor's largest-paying department; the profile itself lists every department that paid it.
